stemHtml:
Maintaining a constant Flight Level and IAS, an aircraft flies into a colder airmass.
Choose the correct statement:

options.a: Mach number stays the same, but there is an increased risk of high speed buffet and a shock stall.
options.b: Mach number increases. There is a risk of a high speed warning.
options.c: Mach number decreases, There is a risk of a low speed warning.
